title: A Night in the Life of Jimmy Reardon
original_title: A Night in the Life of Jimmy Reardon
overview: A recent high school graduate is faced with two options, either go to a business school where his father wants him to go to, or get a full time job. However he decides to defy his father and go to Hawaii. Trouble is he has no money. Along the way he comes to understand his parents and eventually bonds with his father.
